description: CompositionBlack trousers made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides with a patch pocket on the right hip, two pockets on the back, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the frontFitSlimWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton and designed with a cut that offers a flattering silhouette, these slim fit chinos from highlander make for a great addition to your semi-formal wardrobe. Pair them with semi-formal shirts, throw over a blazer and slip into suede shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
